creator: swell.k@gmail.com
text:
Please, close this PR, too. The idea about slave port of libdrm-nouveau
was discarded in preference of inclusion nouveau api into main libdrm
port after discussion on freebsd-x11@[1]. And it was done with update
to 2.4.7.

[1] http://docs.FreeBSD.org/cgi/mid.cgi?1235669033.1289.4.camel
